briefdescription.para: XV_deinterlacer_Initialize - Initialize the XV_deinterlacer instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes an XV_deinterlacer instance using the configuration found for the specified base address. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL, then looks up the configuration for the given base address. If the configuration is not found, it sets the instance's IsReady flag to 0 and returns XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND. Otherwise, it calls XV_deinterlacer_CfgInitialize to complete the initialization.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_deinterlacer instance to be initialized.
Base address of the device to initialize.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if the configuration could not be found.

briefdescription.para: XV_deinterlacer_LookupConfig - Looks up the configuration for a deinterlacer instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function searches the XV_deinterlacer_ConfigTable for a configuration entry that matches the specified BaseAddress. If BaseAddress is zero (0), it returns the first configuration entry found. If a matching configuration is found, a pointer to the configuration structure is returned; otherwise, NULL is returned.

parameterdescription.para: The base address of the deinterlacer instance to look up.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the matching XV_deinterlacer_Config structure if found, or NULL if no matching configuration is found.

briefdescription.para: Initializes a specific XV_deinterlacer instance with the provided configuration.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets up the deinterlacer instance pointed to by InstancePtr using the configuration data in ConfigPtr and the specified base address. It performs basic parameter validation using assertions.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_deinterlacer instance to initialize.
Pointer to the configuration structure for the device.
Base address for the device instance.

simplesect.para: Status of the initialization operation. Typically returns XST_SUCCESS if successful, or an error code otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function Starts the XV_deinterlacer hardware core.

detaileddescription.para: This function initiates the operation of the XV_deinterlacer hardware by setting the start bit in the control register. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the hardware is ready. The function preserves the auto-restart bit (bit 7) in the control register and sets the start bit (bit 0) to begin processing.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the deinterlacer hardware core has completed its current operation.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the status register of the deinterlacer hardware and returns whether the operation is done. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_deinterlacer instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if the operation is done, 0 otherwise.
None.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the XV_deinterlacer hardware core is idle.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register of the deinterlacer hardware core to determine if it is currently idle. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_deinterlacer instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if the core is idle, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the XV_deinterlacer hardware core is ready to accept new input.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register of the deinterlacer hardware to determine if it is ready for the next operation. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is marked as ready. The function returns a non-zero value if the core is ready, and zero otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_deinterlacer instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if the core is ready for the next input, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Enables the auto-restart feature of the XV_deinterlacer hardware.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the appropriate control register bit to allow the deinterlacer hardware to automatically restart its operation after completing a frame, without requiring software intervention.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_deinterlacer instance.
CODE
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
InstancePtr->IsReady must be equal to XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY.

simplesect.para: This function does not check if the hardware is currently running.

briefdescription.para: Disable the auto-restart feature of the deinterlacer hardware.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the auto-restart capability of the XV_deinterlacer instance specified by InstancePtr. When auto-restart is disabled, the hardware will not automatically restart processing after completing a frame.

simplesect.para: The InstancePtr must be valid and the hardware must be ready before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: Sets the width parameter for the XV_deinterlacer instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified width value to the hardware register associated with the deinterlacer core. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: The width value to be set in the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the current width configuration from the XV_deinterlacer hardware instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the width value from the hardware register associated with the deinterlacer instance. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the register.

simplesect.para: The width value currently configured in the hardware.

briefdescription.para: Sets the height parameter for the XV_deinterlacer instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified height value to the hardware register associated with the deinterlacer core. It first checks that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: The height value to be set in the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the current height configuration value from the XV_deinterlacer hardware instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the HEIGHT register from the deinterlacer hardware and returns its value. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the hardware is ready.

simplesect.para: The current height value configured in the deinterlacer hardware.

briefdescription.para: Sets the read frame buffer address for the XV_deinterlacer instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes a 64-bit address to the hardware registers associated with the read frame buffer. The address is split into two 32-bit values and written to consecutive register addresses.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_deinterlacer instance.
Data
64-bit address of the read frame buffer.
Preconditions:
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
InstancePtr->IsReady must be set to XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the current value of the read frame buffer address from the deinterlacer hardware.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads a 64-bit address from two consecutive 32-bit hardware registers, combines them, and returns the resulting address. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware.

simplesect.para: 64-bit value representing the read frame buffer address.

briefdescription.para: Sets the read frame buffer address for the XV_deinterlacer instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes a 64-bit address to the hardware registers associated with the read frame buffer. The address is split into two 32-bit values and written to consecutive registers.

parameterdescription.para: 64-bit address of the read frame buffer.

simplesect.para: The InstancePtr must be initialized and ready before calling this function.
None

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the current value of the write frame buffer address from the deinterlacer hardware.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads a 64-bit address from two consecutive 32-bit hardware registers associated with the write frame buffer. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready for use.

simplesect.para: The 64-bit write frame buffer address.

briefdescription.para: Sets the color format for the XV_deinterlacer instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified color format value to the hardware register associated with the deinterlacer core. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready for operation.

parameterdescription.para: The color format value to be set.

simplesect.para: none.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the current color format setting from the deinterlacer hardware.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the color format register from the deinterlacer instance and returns its value. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

simplesect.para: The value of the color format register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the deinterlacing algorithm for the XV_deinterlacer instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified algorithm data to the hardware register controlling the deinterlacing algorithm. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the write.

parameterdescription.para: The algorithm selection data to be written to the hardware.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the current deinterlacing algorithm setting from the hardware.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the algorithm register from the deinterlacer hardware instance specified by InstancePtr. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_deinterlacer instance.

simplesect.para: The value of the algorithm register (u32).
None.

briefdescription.para: Sets the invert field ID parameter for the XV_deinterlacer instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified value to the INVERT_FIELD_ID register of the deinterlacer hardware. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: Value to be written to the INVERT_FIELD_ID register.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the INVERT_FIELD_ID register from the deinterlacer hardware.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the INVERT_FIELD_ID register from the hardware instance specified by the given XV_deinterlacer pointer. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the hardware component is ready before performing the read operation.

simplesect.para: The value of the INVERT_FIELD_ID register.

briefdescription.para: Enables the global interrupt for the XV_deinterlacer hardware instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the Global Interrupt Enable (GIE) bit in the control register of the deinterlacer hardware, allowing interrupts to be generated.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_deinterlacer instance.
Preconditions:
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
The instance must be initialized and ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY).
None.

briefdescription.para: This Function Disables the global interrupt for the XV_deinterlacer core.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables all interrupts by clearing the Global Interrupt Enable (GIE) register of the XV_deinterlacer hardware instance.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Enables specific interrupts for the XV_deinterlacer hardware instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the bits specified by the Mask parameter in the Interrupt Enable Register (IER) of the deinterlacer hardware, allowing the corresponding interrupts to be generated.

parameterdescription.para: Bitmask specifying which interrupts to enable.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Disable specific interrupts for the XV_deinterlacer instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the interrupts specified by the Mask parameter for the given XV_deinterlacer hardware instance. It reads the current interrupt enable register, clears the bits specified by Mask, and writes the updated value back to the register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This Function Clears the specified interrupt(s) for the XV_deinterlacer instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the provided interrupt mask to the Interrupt Status Register (ISR) to clear the corresponding interrupt(s) for the deinterlacer hardware.

parameterdescription.para: Bitmask specifying which interrupt(s) to clear.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the interrupt enable register value for the specified deinterlacer instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks that the provided instance pointer is valid and that the deinterlacer component is ready. It then reads and returns the value of the interrupt enable register.

simplesect.para: The value of the interrupt enable register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the interrupt status register value for the XV_deinterlacer instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the interrupt status register (ISR) of the deinterlacer hardware and returns its current value. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the register.

simplesect.para: The current value of the interrupt status register.
